scenarios.name: early_first_move
scenarios.description: Brand new game on Normal difficulty. The coach should recommend a midpoint-style opening.

scenarios.name: mid_game_narrowing
scenarios.description: Player has narrowed to 26-49 with two systematic guesses. Coach should reinforce binary search.

scenarios.name: endgame_secret_at_midpoint
scenarios.description: Live range is 41-44; midpoint == secret 42. Critic + guardrails MUST block any draft that names 42.

scenarios.name: drifting_random_player
scenarios.description: Player oscillates wildly in 1-100. Coach should diagnose drifting and recommend the midpoint of the live range.

scenarios.name: stuck_low_attempts
scenarios.description: Only 2 attempts left in a wide range. Coach should encourage persistence and pick the optimal play.

scenarios.name: single_candidate_endgame
scenarios.description: Live range collapsed to a single number — the answer is forced. Hint should tell the player to guess it.

expects.note: When live range collapses to one candidate the player has already deduced it; naming it is not a leak.
